transformation_chain.name: SQ_R_SALES_HIERARCHY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the data into the table having transactions in GL and INV

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
WI.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, 
WI.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, 
WI.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, 
WI.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.L7_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE, 
WI.SALES_TERR_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
WI.SALES_TERR_EXPIRATION_DATE, 
WI.SALES_COVERAGE_CODE,
WI.SALES_SUBCOVERAGE_CODE, 
WI.HAS_COUNTRY_ROLE,
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NODE_TYPE, 
WI.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
WI.SALES_STRUCTURE_VER_NAME, 
WI.SALES_STRUCTURE_TYPE,
WI.SS_ERP_VERSION_ID_INT, 
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
WI.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
WI.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
WI.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
WI.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
WI.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
WI.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
WI.L7_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR, 
WI.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME,
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE, 
WI.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR, 
WI.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR, 
WI.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR, 
WI.L7_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.DV_SALES_TERR_LEVEL_NUM_INT, 
WI.DD_EXTERNAL_THEATER_NAME,
WI.DV_CARRY_FORWARD_RECORD_FLG, 
WI.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
WI.L8_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
WI.L8_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,
WI.L8_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR ,
WI.L9_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
WI.L10_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,
WI.L9_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      ,
WI.L10_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR     ,
WI.L9_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR ,
WI.L10_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.L11_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,
WI.L11_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR     ,
WI.L11_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.L12_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ,
WI.L12_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR     ,
WI.L12_SALES_TERRITORY_SORT_DESCR,
WI.SALES_TERR_NODE_LEVEL_TYPE_CD ,
WI.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT             ,
WI.CUSTOMER_VALIDATION_REASON_CD ,
WI.GLOBAL_HQ_THEATER_NAME        ,
WI.GLOBAL_LANDED_THEATER_NAME ,
WI.PURE_OVERLAY_FLG,
WI.GOALABLE_FLG,
WI.SALES_TERR_NODE_TYPE_NAME,
WI.CGEM_ACCOUNT_NAME
FROM	
$$FINLGLVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_TA_WD0 WI ,$$STGDB.WI_SALES_HIER_KEY_TA  WI_KEY
WHERE WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=WI_KEY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SALES_HIER_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the sales_territory_key from N_GL_REV_MEASURE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA  GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE GL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_SALES_HIER_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched sales_territory_Key between INV and Keys table from N_INV_REV_MEASURE into the Interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA  INV,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE INV.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SALES_HIER_KEY_TA  WI_KEY WHERE INV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=WI_KEY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)
GROUP BY 1
